product_overview: ERP KSI is a modular Odoo 17-based ERP system covering core master data, RBAC, HCM, and end-to-end sales operations. It provides a custom form edit/save experience, hierarchical master data management, and workflow-driven sales processing from quotation through invoicing, payment, and delivery.
core_goals: Provide a consistent navigation and form editing pattern across master data screens
Manage address and organization hierarchies with cascading selection and auto-fill behavior
Enforce role-based access control for users, menus, and workflow actions
Support HCM position and employee master data with organization chart visualization
Enable full sales lifecycle management including pricing, approvals, invoicing, payments, and deliveries
Automate email notifications and document flows for quotations, approvals, and invoices

features.name: NavigationMixin Form Edit/Save Pattern
features.description: Standardizes master-data forms so records open in view mode, new records open in edit mode, and users explicitly use Edit, Save, Cancel, Back, and Delete actions.
user_flows: GET /web/view for a master-data form with <field name="is_edit"/> -> Receive form XML with readonly injected on sheet fields -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw with action_edit -> Receive form reopened in edit mode -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw with action_save -> Receive updated record and view mode
GET /web/view for a master-data form -> Receive form XML with readonly injected -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw with action_delete -> Receive 200 and record removed

GET /web/view for a master-data form -> Receive form XML with readonly injected -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw with action_edit -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw with action_save using invalid values -> Receive validation error and record remains unchanged

GET /web/login -> Enter credentials -> POST /web/session/authenticate -> Receive authenticated session -> POST /web/view on a restricted form -> Receive form with New button hidden when user_can_create is false

features.name: Address Hierarchy Master Data
features.description: Manages cascading country, state, city, district, and village master data with domain-filtered dropdowns and parent auto-fill behavior.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.country to create a country -> Receive new country sequence and record -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.state with country selected -> Receive state filtered by country -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.city with state selected -> Receive city filtered by state -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.district and /web/dataset/call_kw/general.village to continue hierarchy

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.city with state omitted -> Receive 200 and a list of all cities -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.district with invalid city_ref -> Receive validation/domain-limited response or empty candidate set

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.village with a valid district -> Receive village record -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.village search_read with district filter -> Receive villages only for that district

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.state with a country selected -> Receive state record -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.state with inconsistent country_ref/state data -> Receive error or rejected write when server-side constraints are triggered

features.name: Organization Master Data
features.description: Maintains division, department, position, company, location, and level/grade master data with hierarchical filtering and auto-fill up the chain.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.division to create a division -> Receive division record -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.department with division selected -> Receive departments filtered by division -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.position with department selected -> Receive positions filtered by department

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.department with division omitted -> Receive all departments -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.position with invalid department_id -> Receive empty or domain-limited result
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.company and /web/dataset/call_kw/general.location to create company and location master data -> Receive sequences and records

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.position with a valid department -> Receive position record -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.position with inconsistent parent/department data -> Receive error or rejected write if validation occurs

features.name: RBAC User and Access Management
features.description: Creates custom users linked to res.users, assigns per-menu access rights, and provides password and profile preference management.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.custom_users with name, login, password, and position -> Receive created custom user and linked res.users account -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.auth to assign menu permissions -> Receive saved menu access rights -> GET /web/login -> Authenticate -> Access dashboard and menus based on permissions

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.password as admin for another user -> Receive password wizard result -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.custom_users search_read -> Confirm user exists with updated access-related data

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.password_preferences with correct old password and matching new password -> Receive 200 and password updated -> POST /web/session/authenticate with new credentials -> Receive authenticated session
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.custom_users with a duplicate login or invalid password payload -> Receive validation error -> No user or linked res.users record created

features.name: Home Dashboard
features.description: Shows module cards based on the logged-in user’s accessible menus so users only see permitted entry points.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.home -> Receive computed dashboard flags -> Render visible cards for HCM, Sales, or Configuration based on user access -> Click a card to open the corresponding menu
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.home for a user without HCM access -> Receive show_hcm=false -> HCM card is hidden in the dashboard
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.home for a user with no matching menu permissions -> Receive all module flags false or limited visibility -> Dashboard shows no unauthorized module cards
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/general.home with expired or missing session -> Receive authentication error -> User must reauthenticate

features.name: HCM Position Management
features.description: Manages self-referencing positions, employee counts, and position hierarchy for organizational structure.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.position to create a top-level position -> Receive position_id and computed employee_count -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.position with parent_id to create a child position -> Receive hierarchical position record
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.position search_read -> Receive active positions -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.org_structure -> Receive client action payload for organization chart visualization
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.position with invalid parent_id or missing required name -> Receive validation error and record is not saved
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.position write on a position referenced by employees -> Receive updated hierarchy and recomputed employee_count

features.name: HCM Employee Management
features.description: Stores employee master data across employee, personal, family, education, certificate, and training tabs with hierarchical auto-fill behavior.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.employee to create an employee with position, department, division, and address data -> Receive employee_id and linked hierarchy fields -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.employee.family, /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.employee.education, /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.employee.certificate, and /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.employee.training to add related records

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.employee search_read -> Receive employee list -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.employee to update personal address fields -> Receive onchange-driven parent auto-fill reflected in saved record
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.employee with duplicate NIK -> Receive uniqueness validation error -> Employee is not created
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/hcm.employee.family with missing required relation or employee_id -> Receive validation error -> Family record not created

features.name: Sales Customer Master Data
features.description: Manages customer categories, types, areas, customers, ship-to addresses, and partner synchronization with hierarchical address support.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.cust_category, sales.cust_type, and sales.cust_area to create reference data -> Receive master records -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.customer to create a customer -> Receive auto-created res.partner and customer_id -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.ship_to to add ship-to addresses

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.customer search_read -> Receive customer list -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.customer write with updated contact or address fields -> Receive synced changes propagated to linked res.partner
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.customer with missing required category or invalid hierarchy fields -> Receive validation error -> Customer is not created
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.customer unlink for a customer linked to active sales orders -> Receive foreign key or constraint error -> Customer remains in the system

features.name: Sales Product Master Data
features.description: Maintains product types, categories, units, taxes, and product records with pricing and stock fields.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.product_type, sales.product_category, sales.product_unit, and sales.taxes to create supporting records -> Receive master data -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.products to create a product -> Receive product_id, computed price, and stock fields

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.products search_read -> Receive product list -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.products write with base_price or tax changes -> Receive recomputed price and tax_string
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.taxes to set default_tax=true on a tax -> Receive response with singleton rule enforced -> Other taxes are reset to default_tax=false
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.product_category unlink while referenced by products -> Receive blocked deletion error -> Category remains

features.name: Price Conditions Engine
features.description: Applies priority-based price conditions for specific products or customers and synchronizes applicable conditions to customers.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.price_condition to create a new pricing rule -> Receive rule stored -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.customer or sales.products context via sales order line pricing flow -> Receive matching fixed price or discount applied
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.price_condition write to update scope or price values -> Receive updated rule -> Applicable customers are resynced automatically
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.price_condition search_read with date and scope filters -> Receive ordered rules by customer_priority and product_priority
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.price_condition with invalid date range or missing required scope data -> Receive validation error or non-matching result -> Rule does not affect pricing

features.name: Sales Order Workflow
features.description: Controls quotation and sales order lifecycles, line pricing, approval matrices, approval logs, discounts, and state transitions.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.sales_order to create a quotation or sales order -> Receive draft or sale_draft record -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.sales_order_line to add products -> Receive price condition auto-application -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.sales_order action submit/approve/send/confirm -> Receive state transitions through wait_approval, approved, sent, and sale

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.sales_order_line with a product and quantity -> Receive unit price, discount, and indent info computed from price conditions and stock reservation -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.sales_order search_read -> Receive updated order totals

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.sales_approval_matrix to configure approvers and thresholds -> Receive matrix saved -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.sales_order submit with threshold-exceeding amount -> Receive approval logs generated and order moved to wait_approval
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.sales_order action reject or cancel without permission -> Receive access or workflow error -> Order remains unchanged

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.discount_wizard for a valid sales order -> Receive bulk discount applied to lines -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.sales_order_line search_read -> Receive updated line discounts
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.sales_order with no order lines -> Receive validation error -> Order cannot proceed to approval or sale

features.name: Invoice Management
features.description: Creates invoices from confirmed sales orders, supports down payments and credit notes, and auto-generates journal items.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.create.invoice.wizard from a confirmed sales order -> Receive wizard result for regular, down payment percent, or down payment fixed -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.invoice create -> Receive draft invoice -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.invoice action post -> Receive posted invoice with journal items

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.invoice search_read -> Receive invoice list -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.invoice.journal.item -> Receive auto-generated receivable, revenue, and tax journal lines

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.credit.note.wizard from a posted invoice -> Receive credit note draft -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.invoice action post on the credit note -> Receive reversed journal items
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.create.invoice.wizard for an order not in sale state -> Receive validation error -> No invoice is created
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.invoice create with duplicate draft invoice for same sales order when disallowed -> Receive validation error -> Existing draft invoice remains

features.name: Payment Management
features.description: Registers payments against posted invoices, generates payment journal items, and updates payment state.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.register.payment.wizard for a posted invoice -> Receive prefilled amount due -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.payment create -> Receive draft payment -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.payment action post -> Receive posted payment and updated invoice payment_state
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.payment.journal.item -> Receive debit and credit journal lines for the payment
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.register.payment.wizard with amount greater than remaining balance -> Receive validation error -> Payment is not posted
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.payment for an invoice that is not posted -> Receive workflow validation error -> Payment remains draft or is rejected

features.name: Delivery Management
features.description: Tracks deliveries against sales orders with ordered versus delivered quantities and delivery state transitions.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.delivery to create a delivery linked to a sales order -> Receive draft delivery -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.delivery.line to add ordered and delivered quantities -> Receive line totals updated -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.delivery action done -> Receive completed delivery
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.delivery search_read -> Receive delivery list -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.delivery.line search_read -> Receive line-by-line ordered vs delivered quantities
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.delivery action cancel on a completed delivery -> Receive blocked deletion or state error -> Delivery remains done
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.delivery create without linked sales order -> Receive validation error -> Delivery is not created

features.name: Payment Terms and Terms Conditions
features.description: Manages payment term headers, installment lines, baseline dates, and default terms and conditions for sales orders.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.payment_terms to create a term header -> Receive payment_terms_id -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.payment_terms_detail to add installment lines -> Receive schedule preview and explanation fields

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.payment_terms search_read -> Receive payment term list -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.account_type -> Receive available account types for customer/supplier selection
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.terms_and_conditions to create or update default content -> Receive saved HTML/text -> New sales orders load the content as default note
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/sales.payment_terms_detail with missing percentage or no_of_days -> Receive validation error -> Detail line is not saved

features.name: Email Integration
features.description: Sends quotation, approval, and invoice emails using templates and customer/partner mapping.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/mail.compose.message with a sales order and quotation template -> Receive email composer with customer recipients prefilled -> Send email -> Receive message posted and sales order state updated to sent
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/mail.compose.message with approval template -> Receive composer populated for approver notification -> Send email -> Receive approval notification delivered to next approver
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/mail.compose.message with invoice template from posted invoice -> Receive composer with PDF attachment -> Send email -> Receive invoice email sent to customer
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/mail.compose.message with missing recipient/customer mapping -> Receive validation or send error -> Email is not sent

features.name: Disable Autosave
features.description: Prevents Odoo form auto-save on blur and customizes cancel behavior for forms configured in the prevent model list.
user_flows: POST /web/dataset/call_kw/prevent.model to enable auto-save prevention for a model -> Open a matching form view -> Blur a field or attempt navigation -> Form discards unsaved changes instead of auto-saving

POST /web/dataset/call_kw/prevent.model search_read -> Receive configured prevent list -> POST /web/dataset/call_kw/prevent.model write to remove a model -> Behavior no longer blocks auto-save for that model
POST /web/dataset/call_kw/prevent.model with invalid model configuration -> Receive validation error -> No patchable behavior changes on the client
POST /web/login -> Authenticate -> Open a prevented form -> Click custom discard button -> Receive discard behavior without saving changes

features.name: NavigationMixin Form Edit/Save Pattern
features.description: Auto-injects readonly attribute on form fields, provides Edit/Save/Cancel/Back/Delete actions, computes user permissions from general.auth records

endpoints.description: Call ORM methods via RPC (action_edit, action_save, action_delete, etc.)
Call ORM methods with keyword arguments
Load form views with auto-injected readonly logic

known_limitations.issue: NavigationMixin XML injection happens on every view load via get_views()

features.name: Address Hierarchy Master Data
features.description: Cascading dropdowns for Country > State > City > District > Village with auto-fill onchange methods

endpoints.description: CRUD for State master data with country filter
CRUD for City master data with state filter
CRUD for District master data with city filter
CRUD for Village master data with district filter

known_limitations.issue: Onchange methods do not validate parent consistency
known_limitations.impact: Data integrity relies on frontend domain filters only

features.name: Organization Master Data
features.description: Division > Department > Position hierarchy with cascading dropdowns

endpoints.description: CRUD for Department master data with division filter
CRUD for Position master data with department filter

features.name: RBAC User and Access Management
features.description: Custom user management linked to res.users with per-menu CRUD access rights via general.auth

known_limitations.issue: Password stored in plain text in general.custom_users
All ACL rules grant full CRUD without group restrictions
known_limitations.impact: Users can bypass UI RBAC via RPC calls

endpoints.description: CRUD for HCM positions with hierarchy
Client action for organization chart data

features.name: HCM Employee Management

endpoints.description: CRUD for employees with address and org hierarchy auto-fill

features.name: Sales Customer Master Data

endpoints.description: CRUD for customers with partner sync

features.name: Price Conditions Engine

endpoints.description: CRUD for price conditions with auto-sync to matching customers

known_limitations.issue: Uses raw SQL in _sync_to_customers() bypassing ORM
known_limitations.impact: No audit trail, potential SQL injection if inputs not sanitized

features.name: Sales Order Workflow

endpoints.description: CRUD for sales orders with state machine (draft -> wait_approval -> approved -> sent -> sale)
CRUD for sales order lines with price condition auto-application
CRUD for approval matrix (approver permissions and thresholds)
Apply bulk discount to all SO lines

features.name: Invoice Management

endpoints.description: CRUD for invoices with auto journal item generation
Create credit note from posted invoice

features.name: Payment Management

endpoints.description: CRUD for payments with journal item generation
Register payment wizard with amount validation

features.name: Delivery Management

endpoints.description: CRUD for delivery lines tracking ordered vs delivered quantities

features.description: Payment term management with installment preview and default terms and conditions for sales orders

endpoints.description: CRUD for payment terms with installment detail lines
CRUD for payment term installment lines
CRUD for default terms and conditions
